GenAiFunction.description:
Run a task RIGHT NOW in a headless background session and notify the user when done. The sub-butler has no conversation context — the prompt must be a self-contained numbered plan including any record IDs.
Use when: - The user says "do this in the background", "don't wait", "run this async", or the task is clearly long-running (large report, multi-step analysis). - The user wants the result delivered later but starting immediately.
NOT for: - Scheduled or recurring tasks ("every Monday", "tomorrow at 3pm", "remind me", "weekly") — use PlanForLater with a cron schedule. - Simple fast queries or actions — just do them inline.
